creator: alfredo@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sergey Fedorov from comment #3)

I found this on my notes:


How to boot from USB stick:
------------------------------------------------------
PowerBook G4 (A1106 - PowerBook 5,6)

Plug the USB disk containing FreeBSD install image on the USB port at left side of the device.

Hold Command + Option + O + F and turn machine on

On OpenFirmware Shell use:

boot usb1/disk@1:2,\ppc\loader usb1/disk@1:0

------------------------------------------------------
PowerMac G5

Turn on the workstation holding Option key. The USB stick containing FreeBSD will appear as an option on a graphical boot menu.
